nodes.text: Ah... another soul stirred from slumber by the grinding of MEGACORP's machines. Welcome to what remains of The Great Oak, young one. We are few, but we are not yet broken.
Circuit Grove lies beyond that rusted gate. MEGACORP has been drilling there for months. I fear they have found... something. Something old. You must venture in when you are ready.
You returned. Good. The Grove is vast — and its dangers are many. Each time you venture in you will learn more of its patterns. Do not be discouraged by setbacks.
That poster... BUDDY 9000. Their so-called 'Customer Relations Executive'. Do not be fooled by the smile painted on that chassis. It is corporate violence wearing a friendly face.
You did it. BUDDY has been... reprogrammed, shall we say. But MEGACORP will send more. This is a battle, not a war. Rest here. The Grove will need you again.
